last_known.root_cause: LR=1e-3 too high for pretrained init; val_loss spiked epoch 5 (0.8421) while train_loss fell to 0.2247 — severe overfitting

artifacts.validation_gate: Rejected: AUC 0.8342 < 0.85, calibration worsened Brier (0.1664→0.1828) and ECE (0.0625→0.1334). Root cause: LR too high.
artifacts.next_action: Do not promote. C14 uses configs/cnn_tess_finetune_c12.json (LR=3e-5) on same combined splits.

last_known.root_cause: LR=3e-5 too conservative — ReduceLROnPlateau decayed LR to near-zero (1.17e-7 by epoch 79), locking model in local optimum below C13 ceiling; val AUC plateaued at 0.8115 from epoch 56
last_known.calibration_note: Raw ECE=0.0273 is excellent; Platt A=1.696 overcorrects (sharpens already-calibrated probs); 4th consecutive candidate where Platt worsens ECE

artifacts.validation_gate: Rejected: AUC 0.8319 < 0.85, cal F1 0.7860 < 0.80, Platt worsened Brier/ECE. Root cause: LR too conservative, converged below C13 ceiling.
artifacts.next_action: Do not promote. C15 uses LR=1e-4 (intermediate) + on-the-fly augmentation on same combined splits.

last_known.rationale: LR=1e-4 is intermediate between C13 (1e-3, too high — val_loss spiked) and C14 (3e-5, too low — LR decayed to 1.17e-7 by epoch 79). min_lr=1e-6 and scheduler_patience=10 prevent LR from decaying to near-zero prematurely. Augmentation was already enabled in C14 (noise+scale); no change needed.
